title: Malty Crunchy Kenyan Turnip Skillet
description: A flavorful and crunchy one-pot dish from Kenya featuring turnips, with a malty twist and a low-carb friendly profile, finished with a flambe technique.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the diced turnips, malt flour, kenyan chili powder, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the turnips are tender and lightly browned.
Add the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter and stir to combine.
Add the rum and ignite the mixture to flambe the dish, cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
